summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart SEO feature including Bulk Optimize and Single Page SEO workflows. AI integration is active and working correctly. Single page SEO workflow (Analyze → Generate → Save) is fully functional. Bulk Optimize has a UI bug where dialog overlay doesn't fully close.

backend_issues.notes: Backend APIs are working correctly. AI endpoints (/api/seo/ai/analyze and /api/seo/ai/generate) are functional with proper timeout handling (35s backend, 45s frontend axios).

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay doesn't fully close after bulk optimization completes, blocking subsequent page interactions
ui_bugs.details: After clicking 'Hentikan' or completing bulk optimization, the dialog overlay (bg-black/80) remains visible and intercepts pointer events, preventing clicks on page list buttons. User must reload page to continue.

ui_bugs.issue: Timeout value (30s) is too short for AI operations
ui_bugs.details: AI operations take 17-26 seconds + network overhead. Current 30s timeout causes some pages to fail. Should be increased to 45s to match frontend axios timeout.

passed_tests: Login with admin@torado.id / Torado@2026
Navigate to Smart SEO page (/admin/smart-seo)
Sidebar displays 14 public pages (Home, Brands, Altero, De La Sol, Calluna, Rucker Park, Bakkies, Menu, Locations, About, News & Events, Careers, Contact, Reservasi)
Page selection and switching between pages
Bulk Optimize button visible and clickable
Bulk Optimize Dialog opens with all UI elements
Filter options visible (Semua/Kosong/Belum AI)
Mode options visible (Fast/Full)
Global seed keyword input functional
Bulk optimization starts and processes pages
Progress indicators show page-by-page status
Cancel/Stop button visible during bulk optimization
At least 1 page completed successfully with AI-powered status
Single Page SEO: Home page selection
Single Page SEO: Keyword input ('restoran bandung premium, cafe bandung')
Single Page SEO: Analyze button triggers AI processing
AI Processing Banner displays with elapsed timer (showed 42s)
Analysis results display after completion with keyword clusters, intent badges, quick wins, and AI suggestions
Single Page SEO: Generate button triggers AI content generation
Title field auto-filled (57 chars): 'Torado Group Bandung - Premium Multi-Brand F&B Experience'
Description field auto-filled (159 chars) with relevant content
OG Title field auto-filled (46 chars)
Save button successfully saves SEO settings
Success toast notification displays: 'SEO settings disimpan!'
Tersimpan badge appears after successful save
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix BulkOptimizeDialog overlay issue: Ensure dialog and overlay fully unmount/close when user clicks 'Hentikan', 'Selesai', or closes the dialog. The overlay (bg-black/80) is remaining visible and blocking pointer events. Also increase PER_CALL_TIMEOUT_MS from 30000 to 45000 to match frontend axios timeout and prevent unnecessary timeouts during AI operations.
